overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a coastal urban area during a vibrant pink sunset. The journey transitions from a city street with apartment buildings to a scenic waterfront park path overlooking the ocean and coastal highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with apartment towers

events.description: character begins walking along the sidewalk past parked vehicles
passing a white sports car and motorcycle parked along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the urban sidewalk next to parked cars and modern apartment buildings

entered.detail: tall multi-story residential building with red-brown facade and balconies
tall beige apartment tower with illuminated windows against the sunset
row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
low-rise concrete parking garage with horizontal lines
white sports car parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along an urban residential street at dusk, with tall apartment buildings on the left and palm trees lining the right side. Parked cars including a white sports car are visible along the curb as the setting sun casts a warm pink glow across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal park path with palm trees and benches

events.description: transitioning from urban street to paved park path with grass lawns
following a pedestrian wearing a green striped shirt along the path

agents.ego_description: following another pedestrian along a cracked stone park path lined with palm trees and benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green striped shirt walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: black metal park benches along the right side of the path
well-manicured green grass lawn sloping toward the coast
light-colored wooden fence with cross-pattern railing along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the urban street onto a paved park path surrounded by grass lawns and palm trees. The camera follows a pedestrian in a striped shirt as the path curves toward the coastline, with park benches visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal overlook with panoramic ocean views

events.description: path opens to reveal ocean view and setting sun on the horizon
turning right to follow the curved coastal overlook path
descending slightly along the overlook with highway becoming visible below

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal overlook path enjoying the sunset view over the ocean and beach

notable_agents.action: couple standing at the fence admiring the ocean sunset view

entered.detail: vast ocean expanse visible beyond the cliff edge with pink sunset reflection
bright sun low on the horizon casting orange-pink light across the water
multi-lane highway running along the coastline with moving traffic
wooden staircase descending the cliff face toward the beach
sandy beach visible between the highway and the water

segments.scene_description: The path opens to a stunning coastal overlook with panoramic views of the ocean, setting sun, and coastal highway below. The camera follows the curved path along the cliff edge, passing other pedestrians admiring the view, while traffic moves along the highway beneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved park path with benches and landscaped gardens

events.description: passing a couple standing at the overlook and continuing along the winding path
entering a more shaded section with denser tree canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding park path past benches and landscaped greenery

entered.detail: empty black metal park benches lining the left side of the path
winding paved path curving through the park landscape
manicured grass beds with curved concrete borders

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the winding coastal path through a landscaped park area with benches and palm trees. The ocean remains visible to the right while the path curves gently through the greenery, transitioning into a more shaded section with denser tree cover.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a residential urban street that gradually opens into a scenic coastal park overlook during a vibrant pink sunset. It begins by moving past tall apartment buildings and parked cars, including a white sports car, while palm trees line the curb under a warm glow. As the camera follows a pedestrian in a striped shirt, the urban environment shifts into a paved park path surrounded by manicured lawns and benches. The scene then expands onto a cliffside overlook, revealing panoramic views of the ocean and a busy coastal highway below as the path curves along the edge. Finally, the camera continues along the winding walkway through landscaped greenery and palm trees, eventually transitioning into a more shaded section with denser tree cover.
